<noinclude>
Marks a card as deprecated (removed from the game). Used when a card JSON is deleted from data/cards/.

Usage:
<pre>
{{DeprecatedCard|patch=0.6.0}}
</pre>

Parameters:
* patch - The patch version in which this card was removed.
</noinclude><includeonly><div style="border:2px solid #b5623a; border-left-width:8px; border-radius:8px; background:#2a1008; color:#e8c9b0; font-family:'Alegreya',Georgia,serif; padding:12px; margin-bottom:1em; box-shadow:inset 0 0 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.45);">
&#9888; '''This card was removed in [[Patch:{{{patch|unknown}}}|Patch {{{patch|unknown}}}]].''' It is preserved here for historical reference.
</div>
[[Category:Deprecated]]</includeonly>
